{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322025629831C760BD837D84F1D0F"}"},"total":425},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7453374036385153854","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"最新单元沈眉庄篇也写得好好，看综影视这么久，这也才是第二次见沈眉庄光明正大与甄嬛分离开的剧情。
好多作者都爱写沈眉庄不能跟甄嬛撕破脸，说两人情谊深很多人都知道，撕破脸会让皇上和其他人觉得沈眉庄人不行之类。
我就一个大写的问号，小时候见过几次而已，沈眉庄也跟其他格格玩过，难道大家都是好姐妹吗？总不能小时候就见过甄嬛一个人吧。
那群都住京城的满人格格从小到大遇见对方的次数只会比沈眉庄甄嬛两人多，进了宫难不成都要被误会情意深重不能解绑吗？
真想不往来，多得是借口可以用。
看过两人能解绑的剧情后，就再也看不下去不能解绑的沈眉庄同人了，憋屈的慌主要是。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735379571,"group_id":"7434760266467773502","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"785527387471706"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7434760266467773502","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"186"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17047,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":16},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7447279898139902782","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者是有真材实料的，看多了大纲式同人小白文，猛然见到肚子里真有墨水的文我还愣了愣。这本是唯一一本有任务限制，我却没被劝退的文。（不憋屈哈！不受窝囊气！）
因为这本里百分之九十的剧情都是作者原创，根本不走一点原剧情，光是第一个甄嬛世界，早死的甘氏苗氏都有巨多戏份，纯原创。
并且如懿世界魏嬿婉篇也写得非常好，不走憋屈路，被针对了直接怼回去，口舌之争都让我爽到了，作者的笔力支撑起了众人之间的对话，有理有据的，看多了都不会觉得烦，贼新鲜。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733962796,"group_id":"7434760266467773502","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"死丫头命真好，一堆连载追着跑","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzEf2Nw0xkEyLjDmMV2UC6k=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a6950233677c47a3886fb66391efa137~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705229&x-signature=aCkYPz0pvYLcsCnwwqM3VenwEU8%3D","user_id":"785527387471706","user_name":"说了你又不高兴"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"785527387471706","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7434760266467773502","book_info":{"abstract":"欢迎前往番茄小说看谷子的其他作品。
一个咸鱼属性的女子穿梭在甄嬛如懿的世界中完全成任务。

此故事纯属虚构，如有雷同，纯属巧合。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1f46efb1f05afb7e98bf34bea72e5634","author":"喜欢绣球松的小谷","author_id":"","book_id":"7434760266467773502","book_name":"综影视之女配在甄嬛如懿轮回","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1015,"name":"女频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1015&name=女频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1034,"name":"如懿衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1034&name=如懿衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1035,"name":"甄嬛衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1035&name=甄嬛衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7434760393785885246","read_count":"31774","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1166822"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"575","tags":"女频衍生,穿越,同人,如懿衍生,甄嬛衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/da06532a3845916e49a1a97c3c75390c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779303389&x-signature=iiwGGArG%2FtGJLtmrokrWyIOsIcA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"71680986828","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"100"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322025629831C760BD837D84F1D0F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":30,"forwar
